args.query:
SELECT regexp_replace(trim(op.OwnerId),'^#','') AS owner_id_norm, AVG(date_diff('day', CAST(op.CreatedDate AS DATE), CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE))) AS avg_days
FROM Opportunity op
JOIN Contract c ON regexp_replace(trim(op.ContractID__c),'^#','') = regexp_replace(trim(c.Id),'^#','')
WHERE CAST(op.CreatedDate AS DATE) BETWEEN DATE '2023-04-01' AND DATE '2023-04-30'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY owner_id_norm
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT regexp_replace(trim(op.OwnerId),'^#','') AS owner_id_norm, AVG(date_diff('day', CAST(op.CreatedDate AS DATE), CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE))) AS avg_days
FROM Opportunity op
JOIN Contract c ON regexp_replace(trim(op.ContractID__c),'^#','') = regexp_replace(trim(c.Id),'^#','')
WHERE CAST(op.CreatedDate AS DATE) BETWEEN DATE '2023-04-01' AND DATE '2023-04-30'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY owner_id_norm
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 1;
